title: Aegis Medical AI Simulator: Dual-AI Cyber Attack and Defense on a Robotic Surgery Interface
description: Proof-of-Concept simulation of a Da Vinci-class surgical robot interface compromised by Data Poisoning and Ransomware attacks against an integrated Medical LLM, defended in real-time by a multi-agent Cyber-Security AI architecture (Aegis). Demonstrates 4 attack scenarios (Baseline, Slow Poison, Ransomware, Aegis Defense) mapped to MITRE ATT&CK techniques (T1565.001, T1486, T1059.009). Multilingual support (EN/FR/PT).
notes: Educational and research proof-of-concept for cybersecurity awareness in clinical AI deployments.
